stemHtml: For an upcoming flight on a light aircraft, there are no cabin crew and 5 passengers. Who should give the safety briefing to the passengers?

options.a: There is no need for a safety briefing.
options.b: The commander should provide safety briefings to passengers.
options.c: In the absence of cabin crew, any staff from the operator will perform the safety briefing.
options.d: If there are any passengers on board, then cabin crew must be carried and they will give the safety briefings.
